message:
feat(query): Add query guardrails and safe templates (bd-new.11)

Implements query guardrails module in vc_query crate:
- Read-only query validation (SELECT only)
- Safe query templates with parameter substitution
- SQL injection prevention via escaping
- Configurable limits (max_rows, max_runtime_ms)
- 5 default templates: machine_status, recent_alerts, repo_status,
  collector_health, system_metrics

Adds `vc query` CLI command:
- `vc query raw <sql>` - Run validated raw SQL
- `vc query template <name> --param key=value`
- `vc query templates` - List available templates

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
